_comment: Unambiguous move, no confidence given -> default 1.0, no pawn bonus applies (piece was named so all candidates are already that piece).
Genuine ambiguity — both candidates must tie, not be silently broken. This is exactly the case ConfirmationManager (Phase 5) needs to see as tied.
Pawn-default tiebreak — knight and pawn can both reach e4; piece unspecified, pawn should rank first.
Confidence weighting carries through directly when there's nothing else to differentiate.
No legal candidates -> empty ranked list, not an error.
